name: skin-material
title: Material 3 skin
description: Material Design 3 concept skin: tonal surfaces, M3 shape scale, state layers, elevation system. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="material"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/material.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="material" on <html>.
